title: Cool Scythe
description: Replaces all vanilla swords with a custom scythe model while maintaining vanilla gameplay.
body:
## Cool Scythe

Cool Scythe is a resource pack that replaces all vanilla swords with a custom scythe model, while keeping all original gameplay mechanics intact.

---

## Features
• Custom scythe model replacing all swords  
• Consistent visuals across different perspectives (hand, GUI, etc.)  
• Lightweight and easy to use  
• No impact on gameplay mechanics  

---

## Compatibility
• Designed for Minecraft 1.21.4  
• Should work with most versions above 1.16, although minor visual differences may occur  

---

## About
This pack was created while working on a personal RPG Minecraft server, where the goal was to experiment with custom weapon designs and enhance the overall visual experience.

---

Simply apply the pack and enjoy a clean new weapon style.
